tasks.title: Docker versiyasi
tasks.why: Avval docker o'rnatilgan va ishlayotganini tasdiqla.

tasks.title: Birinchi konteyner (hello-world)
tasks.why: hello-world — Docker to'g'ri ishlayotganini tekshiradigan kichik image.

tasks.title: Image yuklab ol (pull)
tasks.why: alpine — atigi ~5MB, mashq uchun ideal kichik Linux image.

tasks.title: Konteynerда buyruq (run)
tasks.why: docker run <image> <buyruq> — image'dan container ishga tushiradi.
steps: docker run --rm alpine echo salom-konteyner > run.txt

tasks.title: Konteynerlar ro'yxati (ps)
tasks.why: docker ps -a — barcha (ishlab turgan + to'xtagan) containerlar.

tasks.title: Nomli, fonda (detached)
tasks.why: -d fonda, --name nom beradi — real servislar shunday ishlaydi.

tasks.title: Konteyner loglari
tasks.why: docker logs — konteyner nima chiqarganini ko'rsatadi (debug).
steps: docker run --name d15log alpine echo salom-log
Logni o'qib yoz:  docker logs d15log > logs.txt

tasks.title: Konteyner ichida buyruq (exec)
tasks.why: docker exec — ishlab turgan konteyner ICHIDA buyruq bajaradi.
steps: d15web ичида ildiz papkani ko'r:  docker exec d15web ls / > exec.txt
tasks.expect: exec.txt ичида konteynerning ildiz papkalari (bin, etc...)

tasks.title: To'xtat va o'chir
steps: Tekshir:  docker ps -a   (d15web yo'q bo'lishi kerak)

tasks.title: YAML yoz
tasks.why: YAML — Docker Compose/Kubernetes tili. Asosini bil.
steps: config.yml yarat: key:value, ro'yxat (- bilan) bo'lsin
Masalan:  name: myapp  (yangi qator)  ports:  (yangi qator)    - 8080

tasks.title: Day-3: konteyner = jarayon
tasks.why: Konteyner — izolyatsiyalangan jarayon. docker top uning host jarayonlarini ko'rsatadi.
steps: Yangi konteyner:  docker run -d --name d15cb alpine sleep 600
Jarayonlarini ko'r:  docker top d15cb > cb/top.txt

tasks.title: Day-4: loglardan grep
tasks.why: Day-4 grep + docker logs: logда kerakli qatorni ajratish.
steps: docker logs d15log | grep salom > cb/found.txt

tasks.title: Konteynerда ish bajar
tasks.why: Konteyner ichида shell buyruq ishlatib, natijani saqlash.

tasks.title: Inspect (batafsil ma'lumot)
tasks.why: docker inspect — konteyner/image haqida to'liq JSON ma'lumot.

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: Image va Container farqini + konteyner VM'dan nimasi bilan farq qilishini ustozга ayt
